name: Study Feedback / Correction
about: Report an inaccuracy, suggest an improvement, or share a study tip

labels: feedback
assignees: ''

## Type of Feedback

- [ ] Factual correction
- [ ] Outdated content (Microsoft has updated the exam objectives)
- [ ] Improvement suggestion
- [ ] New content request
- [ ] Typo / formatting issue

## Location

Which file and section does this feedback apply to?

> Example: `docs/01-identity-and-access.md`, Section "Conditional Access"

**File:** 
**Section:**

Describe the issue or suggestion clearly:

If you have a suggested correction or addition, provide it here:
